entry.value:
[["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","a|0|1|2|3|4|5","eb2dfd19-eb01-4deb-9f2d-71afabc875e9","o|","auto","b|F","a|","a|7","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|D|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","Burp插件单例模式封装MontoyaAPI日志
","2026-03-05T01:49:48.621Z","2026-03-05T03:43:45.463Z","claude-opus-4-6","isAgentConversation","a|X","b|T","o|Y|Z","n|0","5ade4c4d-7a19-4f69-87ba-784bd8935fc7","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|d|e|f|g|h|i|j","0e98da5f-704a-4409-acf8-ed5f243eccd4","1dd7e85e-708e-4b85-b053-a311339c4081","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VCxBHCD","seen","o|k|l|m|n|o|b|p|q","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|f|s|t|u|g|j","exchange-pointer","a22ca091-00ec-49fe-a874-bcb5baedb8bf","2026-03-05T03:00:25.534Z","我现在要编写一个burp鉴权插件，采用burpsuite montoya api编写。现在请你用单例模式完善 @/src/main/java/utils/ApiUtils.java 和包装montoya api的日志工具类，让开发者可以在代码层中控制日志开启关闭。","o|v|w|x|y|z|o|q","50396a9f-b461-481c-a458-4921dc9e406c","2026-03-05T03:00:32.295Z","","o|v|w|11|12|13|o|q","ce6d8d9a-94af-46cb-b936-4bd4ee683bc4","2026-03-05T03:00:36.842Z","o|v|w|15|16|13|o|q","024ccf92-e13e-41a9-9afd-ce5923c4110c","2026-03-05T03:00:43.354Z","o|v|w|18|19|13|o|q","38a9b874-baae-48f7-8573-5fd4e6f4d1f7","2026-03-05T03:00:49.059Z","o|v|w|1B|1C|13|o|q","bdfe9e4a-dc64-4ac3-9b01-7d7dc3ba39ab","2026-03-05T03:00:57.785Z","o|v|w|1E|1F|13|o|q","9db9e902-b42b-4437-8844-af67eeafaa50","2026-03-05T03:01:03.168Z","o|v|w|1H|1I|13|o|q","03db5797-09d7-47c6-bc8a-d7b1d0d010c4","2026-03-05T03:01:15.610Z","o|v|w|1K|1L|13|o|q","e5b88f44-f801-4430-a64b-faf89365706e","2026-03-05T03:01:22.166Z","o|v|w|1N|1O|13|o|q","458d4707-ff7a-4f59-b392-0e382783e932","2026-03-05T03:01:39.719Z","o|v|w|1Q|1R|13|o|q","2aa54700-1777-4de4-b68a-bf02235e4366","2026-03-05T03:01:47.305Z","o|v|w|1T|1U|13|o|q","f47e4b5d-06a8-4605-867b-e355983d91b6","2026-03-05T03:01:57.714Z","o|v|w|1W|1X|13|o|q","f597055b-bb84-470a-ba83-81422369fd75","2026-03-05T03:02:01.473Z","o|v|w|1Z|1a|13|o|q","2a0bf961-a14c-4cd8-ac25-ea0c688884a5","2f4b17ee-57dd-4fe3-ab68-5f70058dc2ec","n|VCxTVnH","o|k|1c|1d|n|o|p|1e|q","3ee528e9-2b64-49aa-9ba3-8cb23a85c7d7","2026-03-05T03:43:45.468Z","现在需要先编写插件的UI，这是该插件的主界面的UI草稿图，请你进行完善，其中右边图是报文对比区，有3个部分，第一个部分是选择区，可以选择对应的鉴权对象，第二个选择区为被选择对象，可以通过选择被选择的对象进行比较，第3个区域是diff展示区，用于展示比较结果



","unseen","o|v|w|1g|1h|1i|o|1j","a|r|10|14|17|1A|1D|1G|1J|1M|1P|1S|1V|1Y|1b|1f|1k","rich_text_json_repr","a|u|1m|g","type","content","a|1o|1p","doc","a|1o","paragraph","o|1s|1t","a|1u","o|1q|1r|1v","draft","o|1n|13|1w|1x","o|S|7|T|U|V|W|B|A|A|a|b|c|8|1l|8|1y","o|C|1z","o|6|7|8|9|A|B|20"],"21"]
